consignor.certificate_value: Humphree AB, Grimboåsen 16, SE-417 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Humphree AB' from Sweden in the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice header and address blocks with consistent company name and country. Allowed normalization for legal entity suffix (AB) and address variations was applied per rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.6 and 4.1.4 resulting in MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd., Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd. Sti, Mimar Sinan Mh.Uskudar Cd.Yedpa, Tic. Merk. A Cd No:1A/65, Atasehir 34779 Istanbul-Turkey
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Sinerji Denizcilik San ve Tic. Ltd.' from Turkey is clearly present in the invoice's 'Bill-to Address' and 'Sell-to Address' fields with consistent company name and country after normalization. Variations such as 'Sti' vs 'Ltd.', and 'Turkiye' vs 'Turkey' were accepted per rules 4.2.2.1 and 4.2.3 leading to MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1- Interceptor Trim System Crank Kit HE, L=83mm(metal) (P/N 020955), Qty. 8Pcs
2-Long std Shaft sleeve kit (max transom 144mm) (Metal) (H, HA, HE, HAE) (P/N 020264),Qty. 8Pcs
3-Shaft short, L=155(metal),Qty. 4Pcs
4-Screw delta PT40x20 A4 (P/N 020161) ,Qty. 20Pcs
5-Screw delta PT50x12 A4 (P/N 020162) ,Qty. 40Pcs
goods_description.invoice_value:
1 - Interceptor Trim System Crank Kit HE, L=83mm(metal) (P/N 020955) 8 Pcs
2 - Long std Shaft sleeve kit (max transom 144mm) (Metal) (H, HA, HE, HAE) (P/N 020264) 8 Pcs
3 - Shaft short, L=155(metal) 4 Pcs
4 - Screw delta PT40x20 A4 (P/N 020161) 20 Pcs
5 - Screw delta PT50x12 A4 (P/N 020162) 40 Pcs
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions and P/N article numbers in the certificate exactly match those in the invoice after allowed normalization. The invoice number and order number specified in the certificate match invoice's corresponding fields, supporting general goods description with invoice reference rule 4.3.5. Therefore, MATCH is concluded according to rules 4.3.2 and 4.3.5.

quantity.motivation: The certificate specifies a total gross weight of 16kg which is explicitly confirmed in the invoice as 'TOTAL WEIGHT: 16KG'. Allowed normalization of units and text variations applied per rules 4.4.1 and 4.4.4. No contradictory quantities found, resulting in MATCH.

origin.motivation: The certificate indicates country of origin as Sweden. The invoice explicitly states 'Goods are made in SWEDEN' in a dedicated section. Normalization of country name and matching per rules 4.5.1 and EU-specific rule 4.5.4.1 confirm the origin match.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) är identifierade och matchar korrekt mellan certifikatet och fakturan efter tillåten normalisering och kontroll av fakturareferens. Det finns inga motsägelser eller oklarheter.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
